title: senecio heterodontus
intro: Senecio heterodontus, also known as Groundsel tree or Buttercup bush, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids (PAs), which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio heterodontus include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Senecio heterodontus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
